body.title: CLOSED: Remove PRAGMA wal_checkpoint block from main.py
body.result: Removed PRAGMA wal_checkpoint try/except block from main.py — was a shim no-op; commit 44b5d500
body.description:
main.py lines 497–499 call `conn.execute("PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE)")` through `self.cortex._db()` (PGDatabaseProxy). The shim no-ops all PRAGMA statements — this call does nothing on Postgres. Remove the entire try/except block.

**Affected files:** `wild_igor/igor/main.py` (lines 497–499)
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/database — no SQLite-isms; Postgres-native only
**Scope boundary:** Delete the PRAGMA try/except block only. No other changes to main.py.
**Test plan:** Run full test suite; grep confirms no PRAGMA in main.py after change.
**Pass condition:** `grep 'PRAGMA' wild_igor/igor/main.py` returns 0 results; Igor starts without error; test suite green.

Validation: Igor session log shows no PRAGMA-related errors or warnings.
Cleanup: no test artifacts.
